meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills Setup: Scale Your Freelance AI Apps
content.seo_description: Stop building basic apps. Learn how to master Claude Code skills setup with Antigravity to automate complex workflows and ship production-ready SaaS faster.
content.answer_block: Break through development plateaus by integrating Claude Code with Antigravity. This workflow automates architectural decision-making and boilerplate generation, allowing you to move from basic prototypes to sophisticated, high-margin SaaS products. By treating your IDE as an autonomous engineering partner, you slash development time while significantly increasing code quality and reliability.
content.intro:
You’ve been here before: staring at a half-baked boilerplate, manually wrestling with API integrations, and watching your billable hours evaporate into technical debt. The market doesn't pay for 'basic'; it pays for the complex, the performant, and the impossible. You are trapped by the limitations of manual coding, where your output is tethered to your typing speed rather than your architectural vision.

It is time to evolve from a coder into an AI-augmented architect. By mastering Claude Code's autonomous execution and pairing it with the surgical precision of Antigravity, you transform your terminal into a command center for rapid, high-fidelity software delivery. This isn't just about faster code; it's about reclaiming your freedom to build high-value systems that clients actually pay for.

steps.title: Configure System Context for Claude Code
steps.description: Establish the architectural guardrails. We define your role as a senior architect to ensure every generated file adheres to production standards rather than toy-app patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Adopt the persona of a Staff Software Engineer. Analyze the current project directory and generate a 'system_prompt.md' that enforces strict TypeScript, modular architecture, and error-handling patterns for all future Claude Code interactions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude config set --system-prompt 'Use the architectural patterns defined in system_prompt.md for all tasks.'

steps.title: Automate Scaffolding with Antigravity
steps.description: Stop writing boilerplate. Use Antigravity to generate clean, scalable project structures that Claude Code can then populate with business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the requirements for a high-performance SaaS dashboard. Generate a modular folder structure including services, hooks, and types that follows industry best practices for scalability.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement the folder structure defined by Antigravity and initialize the base package.json with necessary dependencies.'

steps.title: Inject Domain Logic via Claude Code
steps.description: Feed complex business logic into your scaffolded project. Claude Code handles the implementation details while you review for architectural integrity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Decompose the user authentication flow into discrete, testable functions. Create a step-by-step implementation plan for integrating Supabase with a secure JWT handler.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement the authentication service based on the provided Antigravity plan; include comprehensive error handling and unit tests.'

steps.title: Optimize for Performance and Security
steps.description: Refine the codebase. Use the AI to identify performance bottlenecks and security vulnerabilities before you push to production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a security and performance audit on the current implementation. Identify potential race conditions and suggest optimizations for database query efficiency.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Apply the performance and security recommendations provided by Antigravity, ensuring no breaking changes to existing functionality.'

steps.title: Implement Continuous Integration Hooks
steps.description: Finalize your setup by automating the testing phase. Claude Code sets up your CI pipeline to ensure your app stays 'production-ready' at all times.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a GitHub Actions workflow that runs linting, type-checking, and the unit tests generated in previous steps on every pull request.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create the .github/workflows directory and populate it with the CI pipeline configuration.'

pro_tips: Always force Claude Code to generate unit tests before implementing complex logic; it prevents the 'it works on my machine' trap.
Use Antigravity to generate 'Decision Logs' for every major feature, which you can then feed back into Claude Code to maintain context over long-term projects.
Limit Claude Code’s scope by using custom '.claudecoderc' files in sub-directories to keep the AI focused on specific domain logic.
Use the 'diff' feature in Claude Code sparingly; always review the generated patches manually for side effects in your global state.
Treat the AI's output as a junior developer's draft—never ship without a final sanity check of the entry-point performance.
content.next_steps: Begin by applying this workflow to a single, high-impact module of your current client project, then iterate until the scaffolding process becomes second nature.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting manual coding hold your freelance career back. Master the tools of the future and start shipping at the speed of thought. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
